_meta.note: Phase 1: schedules block added. index.html reads schedules.mlb for full schedule. game_overlays remain for backward compat.

game_overlays.matchupNote: The Hurricanes look to seize control in the desert tonight, but the Golden Knights are standing on the doorstep of history with a chance to push Carolina to the brink. With the Stanley Cup Final intensity peaking, tonight’s clash is a high-stakes collision between Carolina’s relentless pressure and Vegas’s clinical championship poise.

The Knicks arrive in San Antonio looking to put a stranglehold on the NBA Finals, while the desperate Spurs face a must-win scenario to keep their championship hopes from slipping into a terminal 3-0 deficit. With New York one victory away from total command, tonight’s clash serves as the definitive turning point in the series.

The Mariners arrive in Detroit desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a Tigers squad riding a late-season surge. With Seattle clinging to the fringes of the Wild Card race, every pitch tonight is a must-win to keep their October dreams on life support.

The Royals look to tighten their grip on an AL Wild Card spot as they open a pivotal series against a desperate Twins squad fighting to stay relevant in the postseason race. With both teams jockeying for position, tonight’s clash serves as a high-stakes litmus test for two clubs trending in opposite directions.

The Reds and Cardinals kick off a pivotal series tonight, with both clubs desperate to claw their way back into the crowded National League Wild Card hunt. Every win is magnified as these division rivals battle to prove they belong in the postseason conversation.

The Giants arrive at Wrigley Field desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes against a Cubs squad looking to play spoiler in the season’s final stretch. With every loss tightening the noose on San Francisco’s wild-card aspirations, tonight’s opener is a must-win battle for survival.

The Orioles look to tighten their grip on the AL East as they open a high-stakes series against a desperate Blue Jays squad fighting to stay relevant in the playoff hunt. With Baltimore chasing the division crown and Toronto clinging to fading postseason hopes, every pitch carries massive weight in this pivotal divisional clash.

The reeling White Sox limp into Citizens Bank Park looking to snap a historic skid, while the Phillies aim to maintain their stranglehold on the National League’s top seed. Expect a lopsided affair as Philadelphia’s juggernaut lineup looks to feast on a Chicago rotation currently anchored to the basement of the standings.

The Diamondbacks look to tighten their grip on a crowded Wild Card race as they host a Nationals squad playing strictly for pride. With Arizona fighting for October positioning, every win against a sub-.500 opponent is a non-negotiable requirement.

The Astros look to tighten their grip on the AL West as they host an Athletics squad playing for nothing but late-season spoilers. With Houston’s postseason window narrowing, every win against a sub-.500 opponent is a non-negotiable requirement for October survival.

The Pirates look to keep their flickering postseason pulse alive as they open a critical series against a Braves squad desperate to solidify their grip on the final Wild Card spot. With Atlanta clinging to a narrow lead in the race, every pitch tonight carries massive weight for both clubs’ October aspirations.

The Rays head down I-75 looking to keep their fading wild-card pulse alive against a Marlins squad playing strictly for pride. With Tampa Bay’s postseason window rapidly closing, every inning tonight is a must-win to avoid falling further off the pace.

The Guardians look to tighten their grip on the AL Central as they open a high-stakes series against a Rangers squad desperate to salvage their fading postseason hopes. With Cleveland chasing home-field advantage and Texas fighting for survival, every pitch in Arlington carries massive October implications.

The Red Sox invade the Bronx looking to claw back into the Wild Card hunt, but they’ll have to overcome a Yankees squad desperate to maintain their slim lead atop the AL East. With the postseason race tightening, every pitch in this high-stakes rivalry clash carries massive weight for both clubs.

The Brewers look to tighten their grip on the NL Central as they roll into Coors Field, where the Rockies aim to play spoiler and derail Milwaukee’s postseason positioning. With every game critical in the stretch run, the Brewers must avoid a letdown against a Colorado squad that consistently thrives on disrupting playoff-bound visitors.

The Freeway Series shifts to Chavez Ravine tonight as the Angels look to play spoiler against a Dodgers squad desperate to solidify their grip on the NL West. With local bragging rights and critical postseason positioning on the line, expect a high-intensity clash under the lights.

The Mets look to keep their momentum rolling in a high-stakes West Coast clash as they battle a Padres squad desperate to solidify their grip on the National League Wild Card race. With both teams fighting for postseason positioning, every pitch tonight carries the weight of a potential October tiebreaker.
